Package grafioschtrader.tax.swiss.ech0196.model

package grafioschtrader.tax.swiss.ech0196.model
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    grafioschtrader.tax.swiss.ech0196
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    Double2DecimalAdapter
    JAXB adapter that marshals Double values to strings with exactly 2 decimal places for xs:decimal XML attributes.
    Ech0196Client
    Client (customer) information for the eCH-0196 tax statement.
    Ech0196Depot
    Securities depot within the eCH-0196 tax statement.
    Ech0196Institution
    Financial institution information for the eCH-0196 tax statement.
    Ech0196ListOfSecurities
    Securities section (Wertschriftenverzeichnis) of the eCH-0196 tax statement.
    Ech0196Payment
    Payment/income entry (Ertrag) for a security in the eCH-0196 tax statement.
    Ech0196Security
    Individual security position within an eCH-0196 depot.
    Ech0196Stock
    Stock mutation (Bestandesmutation) for a security in the eCH-0196 tax statement.
    Ech0196TaxStatement
    Root element of the eCH-0196 v2.2.0 tax statement (eSteuerauszug).
    Ech0196TaxValue
    Tax value (Steuerwert) of a security position at the reference date.
    GYearAdapter
    JAXB adapter for marshalling Integer to xs:gYear format (e.g., "2025").
    LocalDateAdapter
    JAXB adapter for marshalling LocalDate to xs:date format (yyyy-MM-dd).
    LocalDateTimeAdapter
    JAXB adapter for marshalling LocalDateTime to xs:dateTime format.
